license.name: U.S. federal government public data; dataset-specific reuse terms not confirmed
license.notes: The 2024 AIANNH file and its vintage were confirmed, but no primary page reviewed in this run stated dataset-specific copyright or license terms for the cartographic boundary file. Statistical boundaries are not legal land ownership or jurisdiction boundaries.

attribution: Source: U.S. Census Bureau, 2024 Cartographic Boundary Files. Census statistical boundaries do not establish legal land ownership or jurisdiction.
